text: You bring out your full strength as you give one mighty blow to the safe. It bursts open to reveal glimmering gold and apples hidden within. You hear voices getting closer in the distance so you quickly take all the gold and apples that you can carry as you hightail it out of there. You know now that there’s no place for you in the village, not when you know an easy way to get so rich in one night. You take off into the night with a heart filled with greed.

exit.trigger: leave town for a life of crime
use the money to start your own tavern
